title: pericallis papyracea
intro: Pericallis papyracea, also known as the paper daisy or silver daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Canary Islands and Cape Verde. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pericallis papyracea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Pericallis papyracea can be found in tea, tinctures, or infusions, and are traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
